title: MetaJudge Package v3.1 (Families A+B+C, post-audit)
description: MetaJudge scoring package v3.1. Adds Family C self-correction scoring (self_correction_v2.py), v2 task runner with confirmation-without-restatement detection (resolve_t2_answer), and updated grading engine. Import via sys.path.insert(0, '/kaggle/input/metajudge-package-v3').
